summary: 9/10 v1 findings genuinely fixed (critical DLL roundtrip + runtime-wins mutation-confirmed; 10 deferrals now [Skip]; policy resolution thoroughly covered). One NEW false green: OverflowThrowSettingHonored.test.goal uses decimal.MaxValue which overflows under every policy, so Overflow=Throw is not load-bearing — empirically the same add without it also passes. ~5-min single-goal fix (use int.MaxValue so Promote vs Throw diverge).
